What We Do
Full-Service
Electrical Experts

From simple repairs to new construction, generator installs, and LED landscape lighting — we handle it all with speed, precision, and professionalism.

Indoor, outdoor, and energy-efficient lighting installation. Beautify your space while cutting energy costs.

Generator Installation

Standby and manual generator installation so you're never left in the dark during a power outage.

Low Voltage Service

🛁
Hot Tub & Sauna Electrical

Safe, code-compliant wiring for hot tubs, saunas, and outdoor electrical installations.

🏭

Heavy-duty electrical work for industrial facilities, warehouses, and manufacturing environments.

🏢
Commercial Electrician

About Us
Why Choose
Chiappini Electric

We're a top-rated electrical company based in Grove City, PA, proudly serving Mercer, Venango, and Butler County. When you call us, expect a qualified electrician at your door on time and ready to work.

  • All electricians are licensed, bonded, and fully insured
  • Up-to-date certifications and ongoing training
  • Knowledgeable about emergency procedures and inspection reports
  • We meet — and exceed — all industry and safety standards
  • Military discounts available
  • Free consultations and estimates

Got Questions?
Frequently Asked
Questions

Can't find your answer here? Call us directly at (724) 992-2361.

Why are my lights flickering?
+
Flickering lights typically indicate an electrical overload or wiring issue. To avoid safety hazards, you should have a certified electrician inspect the problem area right away.
Why is my light switch hot?
+
A hot light switch usually indicates a faulty switch or a wiring problem. This is a serious safety hazard and should be addressed by a professional immediately.
How do I know if my outlet is burning?
+
You may notice discoloration around the outlet, a strange smell, or unusual heat. This can be a shock or fire hazard — call an electrician immediately if you suspect a burning outlet.
How do I get an estimate?
+
Simply call us at (724) 992-2361 or use the contact form on this page. We're always happy to help you budget and plan for your electrical project.
Is a permit required for my electrical work?
+
Our electricians are fully up to speed on local permitting and coding policies. During your consultation, they'll tell you exactly what permits are required for your project.
What is a GFCI outlet?
+
GFCI stands for Ground Fault Circuit Interrupter. These devices automatically shut off electricity if there's a danger of electrocution, protecting you from shocks near water sources.
Are you licensed, bonded, and insured?
+
Yes. All of our contractors are licensed, insured, and bonded. We also ensure they complete routine training to stay current on the latest codes and industry trends.
Can you help with energy-efficient lighting?
+
Absolutely. We can inspect your space and suggest energy-efficient lighting solutions that fit your needs and budget, saving you money on electricity long-term.
Yes! We can install almost any type of automated system — smart lighting, thermostats, and more — to help you save on energy bills and modernize your home.
From service inspections to final assessments on new builds, we offer a wide range of electrical inspections for insurance purposes, home sales, and general safety assessments.
